description: Create src/lib/prompts.ts exporting three const strings: RESEARCH_AGENT_SYSTEM (instructs Claude to verify identity, research in parallel via tools, synthesize a Dossier JSON wrapped in <dossier>...</dossier>, refusing speculation about wealth/romance/family/health/minors/non-public sources; uses brand language 'A Sense of Place', 'Relationship Hospitality', 'Affluential Explorer'); DISCRETION_LAYER_SYSTEM (instructs claude-haiku-4-5 to filter a dossier given Guest.privacyOpennessScore 0-100, banding 0-30 minimal / 31-69 standard / 70-100 full, logging every removal into Dossier.suppressed[], output wrapped in <filtered>...</filtered>); each prompt <= 2500 chars.
verify: npx tsc --noEmit && grep -q 'RESEARCH_AGENT_SYSTEM' src/lib/prompts.ts && grep -q 'DISCRETION_LAYER_SYSTEM' src/lib/prompts.ts && grep -q 'A Sense of Place' src/lib/prompts.ts && grep -q 'Affluential Explorer' src/lib/prompts.ts

description: Expand existing seed data per T1's _t2_notes. data/guests/lin-chen.json: replace the TODO Crillon stay with a real Phuket prior stay (Mar 2025, beachfront villa, declined alcohol, 6am beach walks, vegetarian Thai cooking class) and remove _t2_notes. Create data/guests/bellandi.json — Aldo Bellandi, Italian wine importer, 52, single prior stay at Crillon, no allergies. For each property file (data/properties/{sand-hill,hong-kong,crillon}.json): expand to >=5 amenityOptions, >=8 signatureExperiences, >=2 placemakers, preserve senseOfPlace voice; remove _t2_notes. Content references: Wing Wah mooncakes/Asaya/Chaat for HK; Pierre Hermé/Musée d'Orsay/L'Écrin for Crillon; Frog Hollow/Coupa Cafe/Windy Hill/Madera for Sand Hill.

Create src/lib/crm.ts exporting getGuest(guestId) and getProperty(propertyId) (both throw on unknown id) reading from data/{guests,properties}/*.json, plus crmCrossProperty(guestId) returning that guest's priorStays. Create src/lib/flight.ts exporting flightLookup(flightNumber) returning Promise<{status,eta,delayMinutes,origin,destination}>. If process.env.AVIATIONSTACK_API_KEY set, hit AviationStack /v1/flights?flight_iata=...; else return deterministic mock matched to flight number (UA857 on-time, CX870 +12 min delay).
verify: npx tsx -e "import('./src/lib/crm').then(async m=>{const g=m.getGuest('lin-chen'); if(g.name!=='Lin Chen')process.exit(1); try{m.getGuest('nope');process.exit(1)}catch{} const f=await (await import('./src/lib/flight')).flightLookup('UA857'); if(!f.status)process.exit(1); console.log('ok')})"

description: Create src/lib/tools.ts exporting TOOL_DEFINITIONS: Anthropic.Messages.Tool[] containing the Claude native web_search server tool plus flight_lookup and crm_cross_property as custom tools with JSON schema input. Export dispatchTool(name, input): Promise<unknown> switch-dispatching to handlers from crm.ts and flight.ts. Unknown name throws structured error. Records each call into a ToolCallTrace consumed by T5.
verify: npx tsx -e "import('./src/lib/tools').then(async m=>{const r=await m.dispatchTool('crm_cross_property',{guestId:'lin-chen'}); if(!Array.isArray(r))process.exit(1); try{await m.dispatchTool('nope',{});process.exit(1)}catch{} console.log('ok')})"

description: Replace src/app/api/agent/route.ts (currently a stub) with the real agent loop. POST { guestId, propertyId, flightNumber? }. runtime='nodejs', dynamic='force-dynamic'. Default response = application/json with full Dossier matching T1's stub contract. Opt-in SSE when Accept: text/event-stream — events per phase verify|research|synthesize|discretion|done|error plus per tool_use within research. Loop: Anthropic.messages.stream with MODELS.agent (Opus 4.7), TOOL_DEFINITIONS, max_tokens=4096, system=RESEARCH_AGENT_SYSTEM, max 8 iterations, until stop_reason=end_turn. Parse <dossier> from final message. Second pass: Anthropic.messages.create with MODELS.discretion (Haiku 4.5), system=DISCRETION_LAYER_SYSTEM, input=candidate+guest.privacyOpennessScore, parse <filtered>. Captures removals into Dossier.suppressed[]. Errors: JSON 500 or SSE error event. If DEMO_MODE=1 read fixture from data/fixtures/<guestId>__<propertyId>.json and return JSON or replay SSE events with delayMs. CONSULT node_modules/next/dist/docs for Next 16 route handler streaming conventions (per AGENTS.md warning).
verify: curl -fsS -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/agent -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"guestId":"lin-chen","propertyId":"sand-hill"}' | jq -e '.actuators.welcomeAmenity.name' && curl -fsS -N -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/agent -H 'Accept: text/event-stream' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"guestId":"lin-chen","propertyId":"sand-hill"}' | head -c 4000 | grep -q 'discretion'

description: Create src/app/api/voice/route.ts. POST { text, voiceId? } proxies to ElevenLabs /v1/text-to-speech/{voiceId}/stream with model eleven_turbo_v2_5, settings stability=0.55 similarity_boost=0.75 style=0.2 use_speaker_boost=true. Default voiceId = process.env.ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID || 'Xb7hH8MSUJpSbSDYk0k2' (Alice). Stream audio/mpeg back, Cache-Control: public, max-age=3600. Hash text+voiceId, cache mp3 bytes to /tmp/voice-cache/<hash>.mp3, return cached bytes on hit. Missing/invalid ELEVENLABS_API_KEY -> 503 JSON {error}.
verify: curl -fsS -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/voice -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text":"Briefed."}' --output /tmp/voice-test.mp3 && file /tmp/voice-test.mp3 | grep -q 'MPEG' && rm /tmp/voice-test.mp3

description: Create public/.well-known/agent.json — static JSON document per shared product spec. Fields: name='Red Thread', version, description, publisher, contact='agents@redthread.boutique', schemas.guestPreferenceManifest (with guestId/preferences/consent/expiresAt), endpoints.submit, endpoints.verify, principles[] >=4 lines describing POS gating, Discretion Layer separation, multi-layered defense, consent-based schema-governed handoff. Next.js serves public/ automatically — no route file needed.
verify: curl -fsS http://localhost:3000/.well-known/agent.json | jq -e '.name == "Red Thread"' && curl -fsS http://localhost:3000/.well-known/agent.json | jq -e '.principles | length >= 4'

description: Create scripts/capture-fixture.ts that POSTs to /api/agent in JSON mode (and optionally SSE), captures the response, and writes data/fixtures/<guestId>__<propertyId>.json. Run thrice for lin-chen × {sand-hill, hong-kong, crillon}. Wire src/app/api/agent/route.ts from T5 so DEMO_MODE=1 reads and serves these fixtures (JSON directly, SSE with delayMs replay).
verify: test -f data/fixtures/lin-chen__sand-hill.json && test -f data/fixtures/lin-chen__hong-kong.json && test -f data/fixtures/lin-chen__crillon.json && DEMO_MODE=1 curl -fsS -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/agent -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"guestId":"lin-chen","propertyId":"hong-kong"}' | jq -e '.actuators.welcomeAmenity.name'

description: Append a new section 'API Contract (T2 → T1)' to README.md documenting: POST /api/agent request shape + JSON response (link to Dossier type) + Accept: text/event-stream opt-in with SSE event types; POST /api/voice request/response; GET /.well-known/agent.json; DEMO_MODE=1 behavior; local dev via 'op run -- bun dev'. Do not modify existing README sections above.
verify: grep -q 'API Contract' README.md && grep -q 'text/event-stream' README.md && grep -q 'DEMO_MODE' README.md && grep -q 'op run' README.md
